children.text: in the case of an individual whose last discharge or release from active duty is before , expires at the end of the 15-year period beginning on the date of such discharge or release; orJanuary 1, 2013
in the case of an individual whose last discharge or release from active duty is on or after , shall not expire.January 1, 2013

children.heading: .—Applicability of section 3031 to running of period
children.label: 1 .—Applicability of section 3031 to running of period
A
children.text: Subsections (b), (c), (d), and (i) of section 3031 shall apply with respect to the running of the 15-year period described in subsection (a) of this section in the same manner as such subsections apply under section 3031 with respect to the running of the 10-year period described in section 3031(a).

children.label: B
children.text: Subsection (i) of section 3031 shall apply with respect to the running of the 15-year period described in paragraphs (4)(A) and (5)(A) of this subsection in the same manner as such subsection applies under with respect to the running of the 10-year period described in .section 3031 of this titlesection 3031(a) of this title

children.heading: .—Applicability of section 3031 to termination
children.label: 2 .—Applicability of section 3031 to termination
children.text: Section 3031(f) shall apply with respect to the termination of an individual’s entitlement to educational assistance under this chapter in the same manner as such section applies to the termination of an individual’s entitlement to educational assistance under chapter 30, except that, in the administration of such section for purposes of this chapter, the reference to section 3013 shall be deemed to be a reference to .section 3312 of this title

children.heading: .—Determination of last discharge or release
children.label: 3 .—Determination of last discharge or release
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a), an individual’s last discharge or release from active duty shall not include any discharge or release from a period of active duty of less than 90 days of continuous service, unless the individual is discharged or released as described in section 3311(b)(2).

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a child who first becomes entitled to such entitlement before , expires at the end of the 15-year period beginning on the date of such child’s eighteenth birthday; orJanuary 1, 2013

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a child who first becomes entitled to such entitlement on or after , shall not expire.January 1, 2013

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a spouse who first becomes entitled to such entitlement before , expires at the end of the 15-year period beginning on the date on which the spouse first becomes entitled to such entitlement; orJanuary 1, 2013

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a spouse who first becomes entitled to such entitlement on or after , shall not expire.January 1, 2013
